title: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs
display_title: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs
wikitext:
[]: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Fri Jul 20, 2018 11:59 am Heya! I'm just personally interested in what other people's favourite piece of music is from Eva's soundtracks (Including EoE as well), and why their reason for liking said music is. I know it's a lot of people's favourite, but Komm Susser Tod comes to mind for me. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Jibe » Fri Jul 20, 2018 12:39 pm I especially like the piano themes such as thanatos, Rei theme, instabilité, robe des champs , tranquilité and so on from Shiro Sagisu. That Guy is a real genius to be able to extract such beautiful melodys out of his head.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Jibe » Fri Jul 20, 2018 12:54 pm On the symphonic side, there is son much to love it's hard to have a single favorite. I just want to suite dôme notable sélection but I'm sure I will forget some essentiels: expansion of blockade (EOE) is a piece of choice, destiny (ROE2.0), keep your heads above the mayhem, instabilité orchestra version, of course tsubasa no kudasai...

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 12:58 pm Peaceful times with lyrics from 3.0

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Jul 20, 2018 1:13 pm I'd say Red Ambassador, Destiny, Fate, the three Nadia tracks, It Will Mean Victory, Scarred and Battled, and Kindred Spirits. The latter most being probably one of the few pieces of music that actually brought me to tears

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Fri Jul 20, 2018 2:06 pm Jibe wrote: I especially like the piano themes such as thanatos, Rei theme, instabilité, robe des champs , tranquilité and so on from Shiro Sagisu. That Guy is a real genius to be able to extract such beautiful melodys out of his head.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Fri Jul 20, 2018 2:10 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: I'd say Red Ambassador, Destiny, Fate, the three Nadia tracks, It Will Mean Victory, Scarred and Battled, and Kindred Spirits. The latter most being probably one of the few pieces of music that actually brought me to tears

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Fri Jul 20, 2018 2:12 pm Joseki wrote: Peaceful times with lyrics from 3.0

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Lavinius » Fri Jul 20, 2018 3:58 pm Thanatos , which begins in tragedy and then reaches towards a cosmic comedy.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jul 20, 2018 11:44 pm ShonHam & Joseki, if possible, please refrain from double posting. There is an edit button. I really like Komm, süßer Tod - Peaceful Times, Zankoku na Tenshi no Theze, Decisive Battle and Fly me To the Moon Rather boring, I know.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Jul 21, 2018 6:26 am ^ But I didn't double post

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Jul 21, 2018 9:37 am ^ Whoops, my bad. I meant Jibe. Sorry.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Sat Jul 21, 2018 10:15 am robersora wrote: ShonHam & Joseki, if possible, please refrain from double posting. There is an edit button. I really like Komm, süßer Tod - Peaceful Times, Zankoku na Tenshi no Theze, Decisive Battle and Fly me To the Moon Rather boring, I know.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Jibe » Sat Jul 21, 2018 11:14 am Sorry

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by barnett » Sun Jul 22, 2018 8:48 am I'd say Robe des Champs from the second Rebuild movie right now (it's the soundtrack used when Kaji tells Shinji about Misato and her presence to the impact). Short but incredibly powerful and beautiful - and originally used in Kare Kano. Very close to that track I'd put Thanatosand 閉塞の拡大 from EoE.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Sun Jul 22, 2018 9:56 am I've noticed quite a few tracks on the OSTs are very lounge-y, if that makes sense. That one is a good example, it's really tranquil and chilled out.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jul 24, 2018 12:29 pm For the sake of not posting a list of pretty much the entire soundtrack, I will limit myself to three themes from NGE and Rebuild each, excluding the Opening, Endings (including Komm, süßer Tod) and remakes of songs. NGE: Rei I Angel Attack The Beast II Rebuild: Angel of Doom It will mean Victory Dark Defender

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Tue Jul 24, 2018 2:09 pm How about favourite unused tracks? Op-1 is excellent.

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by tootiredtoriot » Tue Jul 24, 2018 6:09 pm The slower and more tender arrangement and performance of Jesu, Joy of Man's Desiring from EoE is so lovely. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=67a5FTa1U1A

[]: Re: Favourite piece from the Eva OSTs?             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Wed Jul 25, 2018 4:40 am Yeah, but it's not original to Eva.
